accountInstallPrompt.title: Install JobFinder
accountInstallPrompt.description: Install the app for faster access and offline usage.

feedback.iosManual: On iOS, tap Share and choose Add to Home Screen.
feedback.cannotOpen: Unable to open the install prompt right now.

installAppPanel.introDescription: After installation, the app launches faster, keeps notifications more stable, and reduces repeated sign-in steps.

android: Open JobFinder in Chrome or Edge on Android (not incognito).
Sign in so notifications and data sync right after install.
Tap the install icon on the address bar or open the 3-dot menu.
Choose Install app / Add to Home screen and confirm Install.
Open the app from home screen and allow notifications if prompted.
ios: Open JobFinder in Safari on iPhone or iPad.
Tap Share (square with arrow) in the bottom/top bar.
Set a friendly name like JobFinder and tap Add.
Open from home screen and enable notifications in iOS settings if needed.
desktop: Open JobFinder in the latest Chrome or Edge.
Sign in before installing to keep session state.
Click the install icon next to the address bar.
If icon is missing, open browser menu and choose Install JobFinder.
After install, pin app to taskbar/start menu for quick access.

android.heading: Quick Android install tips
items: Prefer Chrome/Edge for the most stable PWA support.
If install button is missing, reload once or twice and try again.
Enable notifications after install for real-time application updates.

ios.heading: iOS requires manual install
items: Safari is required to show Add to Home Screen.
If Add to Home Screen is hidden, scroll down inside Share menu.
iOS does not support automatic prompt like Android/Desktop.

desktop.heading: Optimize desktop experience
items: After install, use it as a standalone app without browser tabs.
Enable notifications to receive messages and profile updates instantly.
On company devices, check IT policy for browser-app installation limits.

installAppPanel.checklistTitle: Checklist when install button is missing
checklistItems: Allow JavaScript and do not block service worker.
Make sure browser is updated to the latest version.

feedback.alreadyInstalled: The app is already installed on this device.
feedback.iosManual: iOS does not support automatic prompt. Please follow manual steps below.
feedback.noPrompt: Browser has not provided beforeinstallprompt yet. Ensure HTTPS or localhost and try again in a few seconds.
feedback.installedSuccess: Install completed. You can open JobFinder as a standalone app.
feedback.dismissed: You dismissed the install dialog. You can retry anytime.
feedback.cannotOpen: Unable to open install prompt at this time.
feedback.hidden7Days: Install suggestion hidden for 7 days on this browser.
